g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the admin React dashboard look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the KYC review queue work?')
sendPrompt('How does admin suspend a shop?')
sendPrompt('How does admin resolve a dispute between customer and shop?')
sendPrompt('What analytics does the admin see?')
sendPrompt('How does admin manage delivery partners?')
sendPrompt('How does admin broadcast messages to all shops?')
sendPrompt('How does admin remove a fake or abusive review?')
